texto: I got my first instrument at Christmas when I was three or four. My dad and mom got me a mandolin. It was the only instrument that fit me because I was so small. I went straight from that into drums when I was six and then started playing guitar when I was seven or eight.
explicacao: Citação de Chord Overstreet sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I got my first instrument at Christmas when I was three or four. My dad and mom got me a mandolin…” articula reflexao, mom, small em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como natal e small.
